name: Quick Southwestern Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Bell pepper, cut into thin rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Move oven rack to the lowest position. Heat oven to 450°F.
2. Grease a cookie sheet or 12-inch pizza pan.
3. Mix the baking mix and water in a bowl; beat vigorously for about 20 strokes.
4. Turn the mixture onto a floured surface. Knead the dough about 60 times, or until no longer sticky.
5. Press the dough into a 13-inch circle on the cookie sheet, pinching the edge to form a 1/2-inch rim, or press it into the pizza pan.
6. Mix the chicken and salsa. Sprinkle the crust with 1 cup of the cheese.
7. Top with onion, chicken mixture, and pepper; sprinkle with remaining cheese.
8. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the crust is brown and the cheese is bubbly.
9. Makes 1 pizza.
High Altitude Directions (3500-6500 ft):
Heat oven to 475°F.
